title: VitePress
excerpt: description: Deploy a VitePress static site to Cloudflare Pages. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. [VitePress ↗](https://vitepress.dev/) is a [static site generator ↗](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Static%5Fsite%5Fgenerator) (SSG) designed for building fast, content-centric websites. VitePress takes your source content written in [Markdown ↗](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Markdown), applies a theme to it, and generates static HTML pages that can be easily deployed anywhere. In this guide, you will create a new VitePress project and deploy it using Cloudflare Pages.
